items.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
items.dek: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.
items.body: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.dek: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.body: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
